# edgenext_cdn_push (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `type` (String) URL type for push: dir(directory), url(URL)
- `urls` (List of String) List of URLs/directories to refresh, maximum 500 URLs per request

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `list` (List of Object) List of successfully submitted URLs (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--list))
- `task_id` (String) Task ID for this submission
- `total` (Number) Number of successfully submitted URLs/directories

<a id="nestedatt--list"></a>
### Nested Schema for `list`

Read-Only:

- `complete_time` (String)
- `create_time` (String)
- `id` (String)
- `status` (String)
- `type` (String)
- `url` (String)
